name: claude_session_store
description: Transcript SDK cru do agente (1 linha por evento JSONL; source-of-truth do conteudo de sessao, Fase B cutover 2026-04-21). ATENCAO 2 IDs: session_id aqui = sdk_session_id (efemero do CLI), NAO agent_sessions.session_id. Juncao SEM FK: JOIN agent_sessions a ON a.data->>'sdk_session_id' = claude_session_store.session_id. subpath='' = transcript principal; subagentes tem subpath proprio. entry (jsonb) traz blocos entry->'message'->'content'[*] com type='tool_use' name='Bash' e input.command (script executado, INTEGRO). Prefira a tool mcp__sessions__get_session_transcript a montar esta query a mao.

fields.name: project_key
fields.description: Primary key. Hash do diretorio de trabalho (recompute via project_key_for_directory).

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Primary key. = sdk_session_id (efemero do CLI), NAO agent_sessions.session_id. Junte via agent_sessions.data->>'sdk_session_id'.

fields.name: subpath
fields.description: Primary key. '' = transcript principal; subagentes tem subpath proprio.

fields.name: seq
fields.description: Primary key. Ordem do evento dentro de (project_key, session_id, subpath).

fields.name: entry
fields.description: Evento JSONL do SDK. Blocos entry->'message'->'content'[*]: type='tool_use' name='Bash' tem input.command (INTEGRO, nao mascarado).
